_description: Optimal indexing parameters based on code analysis, DB analysis, and partial sweep results

_changes_from_baseline.frame_scene_threshold: 0.25 -> 0.15: extract more candidate frames from ffmpeg scene detection
_changes_from_baseline.max_informative_frames: 2 -> 4: keep more frames after skin/edge filter
_changes_from_baseline.max_annotated_frames_per_scene: 1 -> 3: send more frames to Gemini per scene
_changes_from_baseline.short_video_annotate_bias_seconds: 180 -> 300: always annotate videos up to 5 min
_changes_from_baseline.always_annotate: false -> true: annotate ALL scenes with informative frames

_cost_estimate.note: 3x cost increase but should significantly improve visual recall
